message:
feat(membrane): integrate alpha_investing controller with cadence-gated meta-observe

New alpha_investing module:
- Add AlphaInvestingController for online multiple-testing with
  FDR-controlled hypothesis rejection via wealth accumulation
- Wire into RuntimeMathKernel as 35th meta-severity signal (SIGNALS=60)

Performance tuning in observe() hot path:
- Gate expensive meta-controller work behind run_meta cadence
  (every 8 or 16 observations depending on safety level)
- Move microlocal sheaf and Serre spectral sequence feeds inside
  the cadence gate to reduce per-observation overhead
- Increase decide() resample cadence from every 64 to 128 calls
- Increase design-plan update cadence from every 256 to 512 calls

Housekeeping:
- Bump SIGNALS from 59 to 60, META_SEVERITY_LEN from 34 to 35
- Add alpha_investing snapshot fields (wealth_milli, rejections,
  empirical_fdr) to RuntimeKernelSnapshot
- Fix hurst_exponent doc formula: log2 → ln (natural log)
- Clean up unused variable in hurst_exponent test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
